title: Naa Ninna Bidalarre

title: Annayya
subTitle: Shivanna, an elder brother, nurtures his four sisters, undertaking the responsibility of getting them married. However, he realises that marriage is not their only life goal.

title: Adi lakashmi Purana

subTitle: Lakshmi and Srinivas, a middle-class couple, save money to fulfill their dreams, but their children have a different agenda for themselves.

subTitle: Rukku fights to save her family as her brother's death exposes secrets within the family, sparking a clash of love, betrayal, and fate.
